name: scenario_NetworkModule_mdns_toggle
description: Toggle the mDNS responder on and off and measure render-FPS impact. Validates that mDNS announcement traffic doesn't degrade the render loop more than 20% on the busiest tick.

steps.name: baseline-mdns-on
steps.description: mDNS on (default) — captures the baseline FPS for the next two steps.

steps.name: mdns-off
steps.description: mDNS off — measured. Expected to match or exceed the baseline.

steps.name: mdns-on-again
steps.description: mDNS on again — measured with a bound: FPS must stay within 20% of the baseline (proves toggling doesn't leave the network task in a degraded state).
